evidence_summary: [CH012_SC002] Purpose: To reveal the internal threat (Sarkoja) and solidify Carter's primary motivation for escape.

[CH012_SC002] Summary: Following the audience, Carter realizes that Sarkoja has been spying on him and reporting his words to Ptomel. The realization of her betrayal, combined with the fear of what Tal Hajus will do to Dejah Thoris, hardens Carter's resolve...
[CH012_SC002] Emotional arc: From suspicion to clarity and intense determination.
[CH012_SC002] Coverage: * Tight close-ups on Carter's eyes/face to convey internal realization. * Wide shots of the Tharkian environment to emphasize his isolation/surveillance.
[CH012_SC002] Continuity: Carter's movement through the city; time of day.
